title: Procurement Center
description: Tick the products you need and generate a priced procurement list or RFQ.

steps.title: Pick products
steps.description: The checkbox grid is grouped by category.
steps.voiceScript: Tick every product you intend to buy.
steps.captionText: Tick every product you intend to buy.
steps.fallbackMessage: Pick products: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Generate price sheet
steps.description: A ten-column sheet with supplier contacts.
steps.voiceScript: Generate the price sheet to get supplier names, phones and addresses.
steps.captionText: Generate the price sheet to get supplier names, phones and addresses.
steps.fallbackMessage: Generate price sheet: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Send an RFQ
steps.description: Requests for quotation go to the selected suppliers.
steps.voiceScript: Send a request for quotation and compare the responses side by side.
steps.captionText: Send a request for quotation and compare the responses side by side.
steps.fallbackMessage: Send an RFQ: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: RFQ list
steps.voiceScript: Here is every request you have raised.
steps.captionText: Here is every request you have raised.
steps.fallbackMessage: RFQ list: not visible on this screen yet.
